meta.title: InvictusForward-1 v1.10 — M15 Only Documentation
meta.subtitle_html: Dual-Strategy EA untuk XAUUSD — dokumentasi khusus yang berlaku di M15

trending_flow.title: 1. KillSwitch
trending_flow.detail_html: Daily wins ≥ 20? STOP. Daily loss > 5% balance awal hari? STOP.

trending_flow.title: 3. Toxic Hours
trending_flow.detail_html: Jam 03 dan jam 17 server time = skip (data historis: WR < 27%).

trending_flow.title: 4. After-Loss Cooldown
trending_flow.detail_html: Setelah SL hit, tunggu 2 bar = 30 menit sebelum entry lagi.

trending_flow.title: 5. Bias Detection
trending_flow.detail_html: Hitung HH/LL dari 9 bar terakhir. HH ≥ 5 = Bullish. LL ≥ 6 = Bearish. Default = Bullish. Bullish & Neutral = BUY.

trending_flow.title: 6. SELL Ultra-Strict Filter
trending_flow.detail_html: Jika Bearish: SELL hanya boleh di jam 07, 10, 22. Selain itu = skip.

trending_flow.title: 7. BOS Detection
trending_flow.detail_html: Cari swing point (fractal lookback=2, window 60 bar = 15 jam). Cari candle yang close menembus swing. Break ≥ ATR × 0.30. Classify: Impulsive atau Corrective.

trending_flow.title: 8. Zone Detection (Candle A/B)
trending_flow.detail_html: Cari Candle B (1-8 bar dari refBar) yang body engulf Candle A. Zone range ≤ $20. Fresh zone saja (max 1 test sebelumnya).

trending_flow.title: 9. Zone Cooldown
trending_flow.detail_html: Zone yang sama (toleransi $1) sudah dipakai dalam 2 bar terakhir? Skip.

trending_flow.title: 10. Confluence Scoring
trending_flow.detail_html: Zone(40) + Volatility(15) + FVG(10) + Retest(10) + Sweep(5) + Trend(20) + GoldBuy(10) = max 110. Minimum 80 untuk BUY, 90 untuk SELL.

trending_flow.title: 11. SELL Extra Gate
trending_flow.detail_html: SELL harus BOS Impulsive + score ≥ 90. Lot dipotong 50%.

trending_flow.title: 13. SL / TP / Lot
trending_flow.detail_html: SL = zone boundary + ATR×0.5 (di-clamp ke fixed $25). TP = entry ± $25 × RR. RR = 2.0 jika score ≥ 95, else 1.5. Lot dari compounding + loss reduction.

trending_flow.title: 14. Order Placement
trending_flow.detail_html: BUY: ask ≤ entry → market buy. ask > entry → buy limit (expiry 2 jam). SELL: kebalikannya.

sideways_flow.title: 1. Guards
sideways_flow.detail_html: Max 10 wins/day. Daily loss ≤ 3%. Skip jam 03 & 19. Cooldown 30 menit setelah loss. Max 4 posisi.

sideways_flow.title: 2. Range
sideways_flow.detail_html: Highest/lowest dari 48 bar M15 (12 jam). Range min $15, max ATR×10.

sideways_flow.title: 3. Entry Zone
sideways_flow.detail_html: Close bar terakhir harus di lower 25% range. BUY only.

sideways_flow.title: 4. Cluster
sideways_flow.detail_html: Max 2 entry per range per hari. Same range = high/low < $5 perbedaan.

sideways_flow.title: 5. Market BUY
sideways_flow.detail_html: SL = rangeLow - (ATR×0.5). Clamp $5-$20. TP = mid-range (50%). Lot = 25% trending.

docs.buy_example_pre:
Jam 10:15 M15 bar close. 9 bar terakhir: 6 HH → Bullish.
Swing High ditemukan di bar 8 ($2655). Bar 3 close $2658 → BOS (break $3).
ATR(14) = $5. Break $3 >= $5 × 0.30 ($1.50) ✓
BOS candle: body 65% range, 1/3 preceding bullish → Impulsive.
Zone: Candle B bar 4 (bullish, close > Candle A top). Range $12 ≤ $20 ✓
Score: Zone(40) + Vol(15) + FVG(10) + Trend(20) + Gold(10) = 95 → Grade A ✓
Entry: 50% body B = $2648. Ask $2652 > $2648 → Buy Limit.
SL: $2648 - $25 = $2623. TP: $2648 + $25×2.0 = $2698 (score ≥ 95 → RR 2.0)
Expiry: 2 jam.
docs.timeline_pre:
10:00  BOS zone A → Posisi #1 BUY 0.20 lot, SL $2625, TP $2687
10:30  BOS zone B → Posisi #2 BUY 0.20 lot, SL $2635, TP $2697
10:45  ADX H4=18 → Sideways aktif
11:00  Range bounce → Posisi #3 BUY(SW) 0.05 lot, SL $2637, TP $2660
12:15  #1 TP hit → win, dailyWins=1
13:30  #3 SL hit → sw_consLosses=1, cooldown 30m
14:00  Cooldown selesai, pipeline jalan lagi
15:00  #2 profit $18 + open 4.5jam → belum 5 jam, tetap hold
15:30  #2 profit $20 + open 5 jam → timed close
docs.worst_case_pre:
Balance $10k, trending lot = 0.20
5 trending positions: 5 × 0.20 = 1.00 lot
4 sideways positions: 4 × 0.05 = 0.20 lot
Total: 1.20 lot all XAUUSD BUY

Jika semua SL hit:
  Trending: 5 × $25 = $125
  Sideways: 4 × $20 = $80
  Total max loss = $205 (2.05% dari $10k)

recommendations.title_html: 1. Fixed SL $25 Tidak Adaptif HIGH
recommendations.body_html:
MinSL = MaxSL = $25. ATR gold M15 bisa $3 sampai $15+. Saat vol tinggi (news), $25 ketat → sering kena. Saat vol rendah, $25 terlalu lebar → RR buruk.

Fix: Buat range misal $15-$35, biarkan ATR buffer yang menentukan.

recommendations.title_html: 2. Pending Order Tidak Bisa Di-cancel HIGH
recommendations.body_html:
Jika bias berubah atau daily loss mendekati cap, limit order tetap aktif. Bisa terisi di kondisi yang sudah tidak valid.

Fix: Tambah ManagePendingOrders() di OnTick: cancel jika bias flip atau loss > 4%.

4 dari 5 input parameters tidak berfungsi. User bisa mengira mereka mengubah risk padahal tidak. Optimizer juga waste resource.

Fix: Hapus, atau implementasikan BT_UseFixedLot / BT_CompoundingPer sebagai override.

recommendations.title_html: 4. Tidak Ada Trailing Stop / Breakeven MEDIUM
recommendations.body_html:
Posisi +$20 bisa kembali ke -$25 tanpa proteksi. Winner jadi loser tanpa perlawanan.

Fix: Breakeven setelah profit ≥ 1R ($25): pindahkan SL ke entry + $2.

recommendations.title_html: 5. Timed Close 5 Jam Terlalu Lama untuk M15 MEDIUM
recommendations.body_html:
Setup M15 dengan SL $25 / TP $37.50 seharusnya resolve dalam 1-3 jam. 5 jam = profit bisa hilang.

Fix: Turunkan ke 2-3 jam, atau trailing setelah 50% TP tercapai.

recommendations.title_html: 6. Bias Detection dari 9 Bar M15 Saja MEDIUM
recommendations.body_html:
9 bar = 2 jam 15 menit. Terlalu pendek untuk trend determination. Default Bullish juga bisa blind spot saat genuine downtrend.

Fix: Tambah konfirmasi H1 atau H4 bias. Jika M15 Bullish tapi H4 Bearish → kurangi lot atau skip.

recommendations.title_html: 7. Total Exposure 9 Posisi Semua BUY XAUUSD MEDIUM
recommendations.body_html:
High correlation risk. Satu spike turun kena semua posisi.

Fix: Total lot cap gabungan kedua strategy, misal max 1.0 lot combined.

recommendations.title_html: 8. Sideways TP Mid-Range Bisa Terlalu Pendek LOW
recommendations.body_html:
Range $15, entry di lower 25% ($3.75 dari low), TP di 50% ($7.50 dari low). Jarak cuma $3.75 tapi SL bisa $5-$20.

Fix: TP ke 60-70% range, atau minimum TP $8.

recommendations.title_html: 9. Zone Cooldown Tidak Reset Harian LOW
recommendations.body_html:
g_lastZonePrice tidak di-reset saat hari baru. Zone hari kemarin bisa block entry hari ini.

Fix: Tambahkan g_lastZonePrice=0; g_lastZoneTime=0; di blok newDay.

recommendations.title_html: 10. Print() Tidak Reliable di Wine LOW
recommendations.body_html:
Forward test di Mac/Wine = Print() bisa hilang. Sulit debug rejection reasons.

Fix: File-based logging: FileOpen/FileWriteString catat setiap signal evaluation.
